mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu(id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, permission, icon, path, component, sort, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{permission}, #{icon}, #{path}, #{component}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update sys_menu
parent_id = #{parentId},
menu_name = #{menuName},
menu_type = #{menuType},
permission = #{permission},
icon = #{icon},
path = #{path},
component = #{component},
sort = #{sort},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_menu where parent_id in
#{id}
